title: Effectivity of Promotion of Social Inclusion, Well-being, and Activeness (ESF): Interviews 2019-2022
description: The data consists of interviews with participants in ESF projects promoting inclusion. The interviews cover the interviewees' experiences of the project and its impact on their well-being, inclusion and activity. The interviews aimed to collect small success stories describing changes in the experience of inclusion and the mechanisms of impact in the implementation of the projects.
